Myth 2: "Vomiting is an effective weight loss method"
Vomiting prevents only 30–50% of calorie absorption; serious medical complications.
Myth 3: "Bupropion can be used as an antidepressant in BN"
Myth 4: "BN is not a problem if weight is normal"
Medical complications (electrolytic, cardiac) and psychiatric burden are significant.
